text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 3 day(s) ago, and I feel more unwell than yesterday. I can't catch my breath.
label: influenza/mild

text: I think I'm coming down with something — bit of a fever, muscle aches, dry cough, 3 day(s) now.
label: influenza/mild

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 8 day(s) — nothing terrible yet. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/mild

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 4 day(s), and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. I can't catch my breath.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 1 day(s) in.
label: influenza/mild

text: Dangerously high fever, severe muscle pain, utterly exhausted. This has been 7 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Nothing dramatic, just wanted a routine check.
label: non-infectious

text: High fever, bad body aches, shivering, exhausted. Classic flu, but quite rough — 6 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 5 day(s), and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Productive cough and slightly short of breath climbing stairs. 5 day(s) like this, though I notice it's not improving. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: My chest really hurts when I cough or take a deep breath. Quite a bit of phlegm, fever, feeling weak. 5 day(s), and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Cough with some yellowish mucus and a dull chest ache for 4 day(s). I'm struggling to breathe.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 10 day(s) of this.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I couldn't sleep worrying about how I've been feeling lately.
label: common_cold/discharge

text: I have a chesty cough with a bit of phlegm and some tightness in my chest. 3 day(s) now. Breathing feels harder than normal.
label: influenza/mild

text: My chest really hurts when I cough or take a deep breath. Quite a bit of phlegm, fever, feeling weak. 5 day(s), and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared.
